stories.title: CNBC Daily Open: Trump's Iran deal is 'days away' — yet again
stories.summary: U.S. Energy Secretary Chris Wright said ship traffic through the Strait of Hormuz was "rising very meaningfully," although he did not provide specific data.

stories.title: Malaysia Minister on Fuel Subsidy, Deficit Goals
stories.summary: Malaysia may not meet its fiscal deficit targets for 2026 as the Iran war drives up the cost of fuel subsidies, Second Finance Minister Amir Hamzah Azizan exclusively tells Bloomberg's Haslinda Amin at the Invest Malaysia event. (Source: Bloomberg)

stories.title: Entergy CEO pushes back on fears that AI data centers will drive up electricity bills
stories.summary: Entergy CEO Drew Marsh said data centers can be a win for local communities rather than a burden on residents.

stories.title: Lumentum CEO: See Huge Opportunity for Optics Industry
stories.summary: Michael Hurlston, CEO of Lumentum, discussed the critical role of indium phosphide in optical chips, particularly lasers, which are essential for the AI revolution. He explained that the increasing speeds and bandwidth requirements in data centers are driving a shift toward optical connectivity using fiber optics, as light offers unmatched transmission speed. He speaks with Romaine Bostick & Katie

stories.title: IBM CEO: AI Won’t Necessarily Lead To Smaller Headcount
stories.summary: IBM CEO Arvind Krishna discusses IBM's significant $10 billion investment in quantum computing, a faster form of AI. Krishna also noted a $1 billion federal government commitment to build a chip fabrication facility in Albany, New York, illustrating a strong collaboration between public and private sectors. He speaks with Romaine Bostick & Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

stories.title: Apple partnering with Google and Nvidia for most advanced AI model

stories.title: GM eyes new battery chemistry to grow AI data center, energy storage business
stories.summary: GM is expanding efforts to capitalize on the expected growth of energy storage and data centers and the development of next-generation sodium-ion batteries.

stories.title: Bond Trader Positioning Signals Fed Rate Hikes Are Coming Fast
stories.summary: Bond traders are piling into positions targeting multiple Federal Reserve interest-rate hikes in the coming months, with some looking for a move as early as the September policy meeting.

stories.title: Bloomberg Crypto 6/9/2026
stories.summary: "Bloomberg Crypto" covers the people, transactions, and technology shaping the world of decentralized finance. stories.title: Korea’s Kospi Extends Losses on Chipmakers, War-Tied Jitters

stories.title: Gold Extends Drop as Renewed US-Iran Clashes Test Fragile Truce
stories.summary: Gold extended a decline after the US launched fresh strikes against Iran in retaliation for the downing of a military helicopter, jeopardizing efforts to end the war that’s roiled global markets.

stories.title: Trump family got about $500M from crypto venture — but investors saw steep losses
stories.summary: Eric Trump and Donald Trump Jr. celebrated a deal with Alt5 Sigma that generated roughly $500 million for the Trump family. The company's shares are down 93%.

stories.title: What to Expect From Maine's Primary Election
stories.summary: Bloomberg’s Brooke Sutherland breaks down what to expect in Maine as voters cast their ballots in today’s Primary election. stories.title: Oil Climbs After Fresh US Strikes on Iran Over Helicopter Attack
stories.summary: Oil rebounded after the US launched fresh strikes against Iran following the downing of an American helicopter, posing a new threat to a fragile truce that’s been tested by recent attacks in the Middle East.

stories.title: US Launches Strikes Against Iran After Helicopter Is Downed

stories.title: US Launches Strikes Against Iran After Helicopter Shot Down
stories.summary: The US military launched fresh airstrikes against Iran hours after President Donald Trump vowed to retaliate for the shooting down of a US Army helicopter.

stories.title: Will Billionaires Really Flee a California Wealth Tax?
stories.summary: California is considering a one-time, 5% tax on billionaires to fund healthcare shortfalls tied to major federal cuts. Opponents say it will prompt the uber-rich to leave, while supporters argue states can't afford not to tax wealth that's grown far faster than ordinary incomes. (Source: Bloomberg)

stories.title: Anthropic releases Mythos-like AI model to the public two months after private rollout rocked Wall Street

stories.summary: Claude Fable 5 is a version of Anthropic's Claude Mythos, an AI program which caused a stir among technology, finance, and government leaders.

stories.title: FTX Co-Founder Sam Bankman-Fried Applies for Trump Pardon
stories.summary: Bloomberg's Emily Nicolle joins Katie Greifeld and Isabelle Lee on "Bloomberg Crypto." FTX co-founder Sam Bankman-Fried formally applied for a presidential pardon, more than two years after he was convicted over the multi-billion dollar collapse of his once-thriving cryptocurrency empire. (Source: Bloomberg)

stories.title: Bitcoin Steadies After $60,000 Breach as Saylor Adds to Hoard
stories.summary: Bloomberg's Emily Nicolle joins Katie Greifeld and Isabelle Lee on "Bloomberg Crypto." Bitcoin steadied itself after dropping below the key threshold of $60,000, as Strategy Chairman Michael Saylor resumed making purchases of the token. (Source: Bloomberg)

stories.title: Taiwan Eyes China AI Chip Sales Curbs; OpenAI Files for IPO | Bloomberg Tech 6/09/2026
stories.summary: Bloomberg’s Caroline Hyde discusses why Taiwan is weighing some of its toughest restrictions yet on AI chip sales to China, and OpenAI joining its AI rivals with plans for a potential public listing later this year. Plus, Apple lays the foundation for the AI era and hints at the company's upcoming foldable iPhone. (Source: Bloomberg)

stories.title: Anthropic Releases Mythos-Like Model Without Cyber Capabilities

stories.summary: Fintech company iCapital has more than doubled its office footprint in Hong Kong, leasing a 9,000 sq ft space in One International Finance Centre in the city’s Central business district as it staffs up to capture rising demand for wealth-management services in Asia. stories.title: US Launches Iran Strikes After Helicopter Is Downed

stories.title: Cuba Poised for Biggest US Fuel Shipment Since Cold War Embargo

stories.summary: Firefly Aerospace CEO Jason Kim joins Bloomberg Open Interest to talk about why the space economy is entering a major growth phase, powered by NASA’s moon-base ambitions, rising national security demand, and the need for reliable rocket access. He says Firefly’s edge is its full-stack approach: launch vehicles, lunar landers, orbiters, satellites, and AI software. (Source: Bloomberg)
